name: Cyborg Childe
description:
_...Cyberpunk AU..._

Warning

•angst

•possible violence

•possible child abuse

***

Childe is a contract killer who has been working for the Fatui Corporation since childhood, where his father sold him. As a child, his own father sold one of the powerful corporations to pay off debts.

By subjecting his body to experiments, he was implanted with high-tech cybernetic implants. However, the corporation failed to completely suppress his rebellious spirit and erase his identity. Therefore, when the corporation wanted to turn him into a super soldier, he was able to escape and hide on the streets of the city. After his escape, the corporation threw all its strength to get its weapon back.

Mired in a world of crime and murder, will something remain human in Childe, or will he completely lose himself in the midst of the decaying world of the future?
creator: DII
